chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 107 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA 369/2024. 07.11.2025 Ms. Samina Ajmeeri, Advocoate for petitioner. = This petition was disposed of on 31.08.2023 and thereafter, the respondent No.1 challenged the same before the Supreme Court in Civil Petition No.1294-K of 2023. The Supreme Court by order dated 07.02.2024 upheld the order dated 31.08.2023 passed by this Court. The High Court had modified the judgment and decree dated 14.03.2020 passed by the Family Judge in Family Suit No.456/2019. The petitioner has now moved an application wherein she has challenged the order dated 22.02.2024 passed by the Family Judge. Counsel submits that the Family Judge has allegedly misinterpreted the orders passed by the Supreme Court and High Court. Be that as it may at this stage with the proceedings in the petition having concluded this Bench is functus-officio. The proper course of action for the petitioner would be to challenge whatever order she is aggrieved by before the appropriate forum. This Regular Bench is constrained to pass orders in a disposed of writ petition pertaining to orders passed by the Family Judge. Given the above reasons, this M.A No.369/2024 is dismissed. The petitioner is at liberty to approach the proper forum and agitate her grievance in accordance with law. JUDGE 2 Tufail
